I swear I'll drink no more, yet drink on still, Both penitence and drink my needs fulfil. 2. Recantation; renunciation; abjuration. taubah, taubah taubah , intj. Fy! foh! faugh! ugh! no! never more! my God! good gracious! Heaven avert! God forbid! Taubā taubā kar-ke kahtī hūṅ . Wom. taubah toṛnā , v. n. To break one's vow. Sāqī, tū ch bār to taubah merī ko toṛ! Taubah karūṅ jo phir to hai taubah hazār bār! Mīr. Cup boy, this once perforce but make me break my vow, I vow a thousand times I ne'er again will vow! taubah dhāṛ k., taubah tillā k . Wom. v. n. To make a hell of a noise; to yell; howl. taubah k . v. n. To cry peccavi ; to repent (of sin); recant; renounce; deprecate; abjure; forswear. Taubah kar bande is ga…

more: s. m. 1. A horse. 2. A young unbroken horse. 3. A high blooded, noble steed, a war-horse. 4. A plump horse. 5. A horse with a hard mouth or unmanageable.

ety: inf. n. ii of وشح; but derived from wishāḥ 'a belt or girdle'
def: s.f. Putting a belt or girdle (on); adorning; arranging verses so that the initials of the lines being put together may form some word or verse; an acrostic.
more: (inf. ii. of وشاح) s. Putting on the girdle called وشاح; (in poetry) arranging the verses so that the initials of the lines being put together may form some word or verse.

ety: fr. t̤āʼūs
def: adj. Of or relating to the peacock; adorned with peacock's feathers, or with jewels, &c. to resemble a peacock's tail (as a throne); — s.f. A kind of ornamental handwriting.

ety: inf. n. ii of وصف 'to describe,' &c.
def: s.f. Describing; qualifying, description; commendation; a qualified substantive (in Gram.).
more: (inf. ii. of وصف) s. f. Description, commendation.

ety: inf. n. ii of وزع 'to check; to bring together'
def: s.f. A paper in which the different separate payments made by a zamindār, &c. are entered; statement, account; rent-roll; descriptive roll.
more: n. f. وزع shaped. A statement; account; rent roll; descriptive roll.

ety: inf. n. ii of وضع 'to place or lay down'
def: s.f. Putting down; depressing; humbling, lowering.

ety: inf. n. ii of وضح 'to be clear, evident,' &c.
def: s.f. Making clear or evident; manifestation; illustrating; publishing; statement, account of collections ( = tauzīʻ).
more: (inf. ii. of وضوح) s. f. Manifestation; statement, account of collections.

def: s.m. = tawā, q.v.
adj. Thy, thine ( = terā: com. in H. poetry).
more: adv. Then, that time, in that case, moreover, that, also, for, yes, well. توبهي tau bhī or to bhī, adv. Even then; still, yet, nevertheless. تولون يا تولگ tau loṅ or tau lag, adv. Then, in that case, till then, so long.
ex: اے خدا تو ہی میرا مددگار ہے!
ai xudā tū-hī merā madadgār hai!
O God, only Thou art my helper!
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Apabhramsa तुहुं (tuhũ), from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀢𑀼𑀫𑀁 (tumaṃ), 𑀢𑀼𑀁 (tuṃ), from Sanskrit त्वम् (tvam).

ety: S. तापकः; cf. tāwā, & the P. tāba
def: s.m. An iron plate or pan on which break-cakes are baked, a griddle; a frying-pan; the small plate or shard in a ćilam on which the tobacco is placed; a shard placed over the tobacco in the ćilam; a leaden pan let down into a well to cool the water, or to check excessive flow; — bottom, or bed (of a river, &c.); layer, stratum; an iron mirror
more: n. m. S. तप् to heat, P. tābah . 1. An iron pan on which bread is baked; a griddle. 1. Āṅkhoṅ meṅ kājal kyā ḍālā, bhaṭyārī kā tavā hī lūṭ līyā. Phabtī . Chaff. Pencilled her eyes with lamp black, do you say? Inn-keeper's griddle she has plundered, nay! 2. Tave kī terī, tāī kī merī . Prov. The baked cake on the pan for thee, the dough in kneading trough for me. 2. A leaden pan let down in a well for cooling the water or to check excessive flow. Is kueṅ meṅ tavā ḍalvā do . 3. A shard placed over the tobacco in the chilam . 4. Layer; stratum; bottom; bed. Daryā kā tavā ṭūṭ gayā . The bed of the river has sunk. (It cannot be sounded). tave par kī būṅd , adj. lit . a drop on a baking pan. 1. Trifling; small; petty. 2. Transient; fleeting. tavā sir se bāṅdhnā , v. n. To fortify oneself; to prepare to ward a blow. tavā haṅsnā , Wom. v. n. Sparks of fire falling from a frying pan (a good omen). …
n. m. Rus. Wom. Attention; mind ( dhiyān ).

(تاوه or تابه) s. m. 1. The iron plate on which bread is baked. 2. The part of a ḥuḳḳa to which the tobacco is fixed, or the tobacco itself. 3. An iron mirror. ¶ tauwā (dakh.) See تابه tāba. توي پوکي کهلي هونا tauwe po kī khillī honā (dakh.) To be unsettled or agitated.
subs: s.f. lit. 'A drop of water from off a baking-pan'; anything trifling or insignificant, a mere trifle; a transient or fleeting thing
s.m. The falling of sparks from a tawā (regarded as a good omen)
adj. lit. 'An inverted tawā'; coal-black, jet-black.
wety: From Sanskrit तापक (tāpaka). Cognate with Persian تابه (tâbe) and تاوه (tâve).

def: s.m. pl. (of tāběʻ, q.v.), Followers, dependants; &c.

ety: inf. n. of طوف 'to go or walk round,' &c.
def: s.f. Going round, turning; circumambulating; encompassing; making the circuit (of a holy place, as Mecca, &c.); pilgrimage
more: n. m. Making the circuit of Mecca or some other holy place. tavāf k. , v. a. To go round some holy place ( pirkrimā k .).
(from طوف) s. f. Turning, encompassing, pilgrimage, making the circuit of Mecca or of some other holy place.
subs: (-kī), To go round; to make the circuit (of a holy place).

ety: inf. n. vi of وفق 'to find (a thing) convenient,' &c.
def: s.m. Concord, harmony, agreement, concurrence, coincidence; (in Arith.) the relation between two numbers which have a common measure, commensurability.
more: (inf. vi. of وفق) s. m. 1. Concord, agreement, coincidence, concurrence. 2. (in arithmetick) The relation between two numbers which have a common divisor (as 6 and 8; both being divisible by 2).

ety: inf. n. v. of وهم 'to think, imagine,' &c.
def: s.m. Thinking, imagining, supposing; imagination, fancy, supposition, conjecture; suspicion; imputation.
more: (inf. v. of وهم) s. m. Suspicion, imputation, imagination, conjecture, fancy.

ety: inf. n. v of وحش 'to fly in terror'
def: s.m. Being desolate, being deserted (a city, &c.); feeling desolate or scared; flying (from), aversion, horror.
s.f. corr. of tabāhī, q.v. s.f. Ruin, wreck, destruction, perdition; wretchedness, misery; wickedness, depravity
subs: v.n. To experience misery; to be afflicted.

ety: pl. of t̤āʼifa, q.v.
def: s.f. Tribes, peoples, nations; troops, bands (particularly of dancing girls); — s.f. sing. A dancing girl.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian طَوَائِف (tawā'if), ultimately borrowed from Arabic طَوائِف (ṭawāʔif).

ety: inf. n. v of وجه 'to turn the face (to)'
def: s.f. Directing the steps (towards), turning (towards or to); countenancing, regarding, attending (to); inclination; regard; attention, consideration, countenance, favour, kindness, obligingness.
more: n. f. وجه turning the face to. 1. The act of turning towards; leaning; bent; inclination; bias. 2. Attention; consideration; application; care; regard. 3. Countenance; favor; patronage; condescension.

(inf. v. of وجه) s. f. 1. Turning, proceeding or undertaking a journey towards, countenancing, regarding, regard, attending to, attention, tendency. 2. Kindness, favour, obligingness. (Plur. توجـﮩ‍ات).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَوَجُّه (tawajju), from Arabic تَوَجُّه (tawajjuh). First attested in c. 1657 as Middle Hindi توجہ (tvjh /⁠tavajjuh⁠/).

def: s.f. pl. (of tawajjǒh), Attentions, favours, kindnesses, &c.

ety: inf. n. vi of وجد 'to be transported'
def: s.m. Mutual ecstasy, rapture.
more: (inf. vi. of وجد q. v.) s. Mutual ecstacy, rapture.

ety: inf. n. v of وقع 'to fall'
def: s.f. Expectation, hope; trust, reliance; wish, desire; request
more: n. f. وقع alighting (birds). Hope ( ās , 2).
(inf. v. of وقوع) s. f. 1. Expectation, hope, desire, wish, trust, reliance. 2. Request. توقع رکهنا tawaḳḳuﻌ rakhnā, To expect, to hope.
subs: (-kī, of a thing, -se, from a person), To entertain or have hope, to hope; to expect, to look (for), to desire.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian توقع (tawaqqu'), from Arabic تَوَقُّع (tawaqquʕ).

ety: inf. n. v of وقف 'to stand, stop,' &c.
def: s.m. Stopping, pausing; pause, cessation; delay, suspension; hesitation; tediousness; patience
more: n. m. وقف standing; stopping. 1. Delay; respite; suspension; pause ( taammul ).
(inf. v. of وقف) s. m. Delay, pause, hesitation, cessation, tediousness; patience. توقف کرنا tawaḳḳuf karnā, To pause, hesitate, wait, delay, dally.
subs: v.n. To pause, hesitate, wait, delay, dally, &c.

ety: inf. n. v of وکل 'to entrust' (to), &c.
def: s.m. Trusting (to), depending (upon); trust in God; faith, reliance; resignation (to the Divine will)
more: n. m. وکل entrusting one's affairs to another. Trust in God; faith; resignation. tavakkul par baiṭhnā , v. n. 1. To trust in God; to hope for the best. 2. To do nothing; to sit idle.
(inf. v. of وکل) s. m. Trust in God, reliance, faith, resignation (to God).
subs: To rest in hope, to trust in God, to be resigned; to sit idle, to do nothing.

ety: inf. n. v of وقر 'to be mild,' &c.
def: s.m. Mildness, modesty, gentleness; sedateness, gravity; respect, dignity, honour.
more: (inf. v. of وقر) s. m. Respect, honour, modesty, mildness.

def: adv. Rapidly, fast, quick.
s.m. = taṅwālā, q.v. s.m. Darkness before the eyes, fainting, a swoon.

ety: prob. for A. t̤uwālat, fem. of t̤uwāl = t̤awīl; — or for t̤awīlat
def: s.f. Prolonging; length, protractedness; prolixity.

ety: inf. n. vi of ولي 'to be near or contiguous'
def: s.f. Following in succession; continuation, succession.
more: (inf. vi. of ولي) s. f. Continuation, succession.

def: s.m. = tāʼolā; utāwalā, q.v. adv. Rapidly, fast, quick.

ety: for A. tawallī, inf. n. v of ولي 'to be near,' &c.
def: s.m. Affection, attachment; cultivating friendship; hope.
more: (inf. v. of ولي) s. m. 1. Attachment, affection. 2. Hope.

ety: inf. n. v of ولد 'to bear children'
def: s.m. Birth, nativity; — adj. Born, generated
more: (inf. v. of ولد) 1. s. m. Birth, nativity. 2. adj. Born, generated. تولدهونا tawallud honā, To be born.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَوَلُّد (tawallud), from Arabic تَوَلُّد (tawallud).

def: Ped. v. n. To be born.

ety: inf. n. vi of ولد 'to bear children'
def: s.m. Begetting, being born generation after generation; propagation, generating again and again.
more: (inf. vi. of ولد) s. Begetting or being born generation after generation, propagating, generation.

def: s.m. A twin ( = joṛlā).
s.m. dual (of tauʼam), Twins (syn. joṛle).

ety: S. तर्पण, rt. तृप्
def: s.m. Satisfaction, compensation, amends, recompense, retaliation; penalty, forfeit, fine, mulct; fine for bloodshed (opp. to qiṣāṣ, q.v.); — debt; a loan
more: n. m. tāb power, ān price. 1. Penalty; forfeit; fine; damages. 2. Retaliation; compensation; atonement; satisfaction. 3. (In law) . The fine for dīat or bloodshed as distinguished from qisās retaliation. tāvān bāṅdhnā, tāvān lenā, yā lagānā , v. a. To fine; mulct; amerce. tāvān dilānā , v. a. To adjudge damages. tāvān denā , v. n. To pay a penalty or damages.

s. m. 1. Retaliation, recompense, amends. 2. Debt. 3. Fine, mulct. 4. Loan. (تاوان is used in opposition to قصاص ḳiṣāṣ, and means the price paid for blood). تاوان باندهنا يا لينا tāwān-bāndhnā or -lenā, To fine, to mulct. تاوان لگانا tāwān lagānā, To amerce.
subs: tāwān lagānā, tāwān lenā, v.n. To fine, mulct, amerce
(-ko), To cause compensation to be made, to adjudge damages
(-ko), To make amends, pay a penalty.

def: adj. See s.v. tawān. s.m. Satisfaction, compensation, amends, recompense, retaliation; penalty, forfeit, fine, mulct; fine for bloodshed (opp. to qiṣāṣ, q.v.); — debt; a loan
subs: tāwān lagānā, tāwān lenā, v.n. To fine, mulct, amerce
(-ko), To cause compensation to be made, to adjudge damages
(-ko), To make amends, pay a penalty.

def: adj. = tawāngar, q.v. adj. See s.v. tawān. s.m. Satisfaction, compensation, amends, recompense, retaliation; penalty, forfeit, fine, mulct; fine for bloodshed (opp. to qiṣāṣ, q.v.); — debt; a loan
subs: tāwān lagānā, tāwān lenā, v.n. To fine, mulct, amerce
(-ko), To cause compensation to be made, to adjudge damages
(-ko), To make amends, pay a penalty.

def: s.f. = tawāngarī, q.v.s.v. tawān.
s.f. Compensation, &c. ( = tāwān).
s. f. 1. Compensation. 2. Debt. 3. Fine. 4. Loan.
s.m. = taṅwar, and tomar, qq.v. s.m. Copper ( = tāṅbā, q.v.). s.m. Copper
more: n. m. S. तमर The name of a tribe among Rājpūts. Killī to ḍhillī bhaī, taṅvar bhaë mat-hīṅ .
subs: s.m. A copper rupee, a bad rupee
s.m. Sulphate of copper, blue vitriol.

def: s.m. See s.v. ta. s.m. A tail, the breast; the womb; the hip or flank; a warrior; a thief; a wicked man; an outcast, a barbarian; a jewel; nectar; a tree; — passing, crossing.
more: n. m. (Gram.) The त, or dental class of consonants; viz. त, थ, द, ध, न. .
( Gram .) The consonants of the ट or cerebral class, viz. ट ठ ड ढ ण. .

def: s.m. See s.v. ṭa. s.m. A tail, the breast; the womb; the hip or flank; a warrior; a thief; a wicked man; an outcast, a barbarian; a jewel; nectar; a tree; — passing, crossing.
s.f. pl. (of tārīḵẖ), Dates; chronicles, histories, annals.
more: n. f. pl. of تاريخ q. v. History; annals; chronicles.
s. (plur. of تاريخ) 1. Dates. 2. Histories, annals.

ety: inf. n. vi of ورد 'to enter'
def: s.m. Unintentionally inserting the sense of another's verses in one's own poems; — corresponding (by letter).
more: (inf. vi. of ورد or ورود) s. m. 1. Unintentionally inserting the sense of another in oneʼs own poems. 2. Corresponding by letter.

ety: inf. n. v of وسل not in use
def: s.m. Introduction (to another person; conjunction; copulation (cf wasīla).
more: n. m. Ped. for وسليه q. v.
(inf. v. of وسل) s. m. 1. Conjunction, copulation. 2. Introduction (to another person).

ety: inf. n. v of وسط 'to sit in the midst'
def: s.m. Mediation; introduction; middle-man, mediator, umpire.
more: (inf. v. of وسط) s. m. 1. Mediation. 2. Introduction; also, a mediator, or introducer.

def: adj. & adv. So great; so much, so many; such; so far, so long; — so greatly, to such an extent; until.

ety: inf. n. v of وطن 'to dwell, abide'
def: s.m. Fixing one's residence (in a place or country), taking up one's abode (in); residence.
more: (inf. v. of وطن) s. m. Fixing oneʼs residence in a country, residence.

ety: inf. n. vi of وتر 'to separate,' &c.
def: s.m. Following in succession; succession, continuation.
more: (inf. vi. of وتر) s. m. Continuation, succession.

def: n. f. pl. of طايفه A dancing girl. Kasbī jo tavāyaf koi ho jātī hai buṛhyā, Phir 'jān,' kahāne se woh sharmātī hai buṛhyā, Sir dhuntī hai, uktātī hai, ghabrātī hai buṛhyā, Din rāt isī soch meṅ gam khātī hai buṛhyā, Yeh dard wohi jāne jo ho jātī hai buṛhyā . Nazīr. The fille de joie become a woman old, Call her 'my love,' shame feels the woman old, Each word and deed doth shame the woman old, She beats her head, heart-sore the woman old, Such griefs known only to the woman old! tavāyaf-ul-mulūkī , n. f. Anarchy. tavāyaf h. , v. n. 1. To be deflowered. 2. To become a prostitute.
more: s. f. plur. (of طايفه) People, nations, troops, bands (particularly, of dancing girls).

ety: inf. n. vi of وضع 'to place, lay down'
def: s.f. Humility; attention, civility, courtesy; hospitality, reception, entertainment; gift, present; pretended kindness, empty compliments
more: n. f. وضع form. 1. Affability; attentions; civility. 2. An entertainment; a reception; hospitality. 3. A gift; present. tavāzo-i-Samarqandī , False politeness; empty compliments. tavāzo-i-Shīrāz , n. f. Simple fare; homely diet. tavāzo k . v. a. To entertain; receive with all politeness. 2. To present; offer.
(inf. vi. of وضع) s. f. Humility, attention, civility, pretended kindness, empty compliments. تواضع سمرقندي tawāẓuﻌ-i-samarḳandī, False politeness, pretended kindness, empty compliment.
subs: (-kī), To treat with civility or courtesy, to receive with politeness; to entertain; to offer (a thing) as a present, to make a present (to).

ety: inf. n. v. of وضأ 'to excel in cleanliness,' &c.'
def: s.f. Performing ablutions before prayer; arriving at the age of puberty (boys or girls) when ablution must be performed.
more: (inf. v. of وضأ or وضوٴ) s. f. 1. Performing the ablution before prayer. 2. Arriving at the age of puberty when ablution must be performed.

ety: inf. n. ii of عوق 'to hinder; to cleave (to)'
def: s.f. Hindering, preventing; averting; delaying; suspending, suspension.
more: (inf. ii. of عوق) s. f. Suspending, suspension, preventing, delaying, averting.

ety: inf. n. ii of اول 'to revert,' &c.
def: s.f. Explanation, exposition, elucidation, interpretation; paraphrase; turning (language) from the obvious meaning, interpreting in a manner not according to the obvious meaning
more: n. f. اول interpreting. 1. Interpretation; elucidation; explanation. 2. False argument; idle excuse. Miyāṅ, tum yuṅhī tāvīleṅ kīyā karte ho .
(inf. ii. of اول) s. f. Explanation, elucidation, interpretation, paraphrase.
subs: (-kī), To explain, &c.; to interpret (verses, dreams, &c.); to turn (language) from the obvious meaning.

ety: v.n. fr. طول 'to be or become long'; see t̤ūl
def: adj. Long; tall; prolix; diffuse.
more: adj. 1. Long. 2. ( tūl tavīl ) Prolix; diffuse.
(from طول) adj. Long, tall, prolix, diffuse.

ety: for A. طويلة, fem. of t̤awīl, q.v.
def: s.m. A long rope with which cattle are tied; a tether, foot-band, fetter; — a stable, stall.
more: n. m. A stall; stable. 1. Kauṛī na ho to phir yeh jhamelā kahāṅ se ho, Rath-khāna, fil-khāna, tavelā kahāṅ se ho? Nazir. Without the pence to spend whence all this pomp and show displayed? Your carriage, horses, elephants, a numerous cavalcade! 2. Aise tavele meṅ bandhte haiṅ! Mazāq. Jest. Such fellows are tethered in stables.
(from طول) s. m. 1. A long rope with which cattle are tied, a tether, foot-band, fetter; hence, 2. (vulg. t̤awela ) A stable, a stall.

ety: inf. n. ii of عوذ 'to seek protection'
def: s.m. Praying for protection or preservation (by invoking God, or by uttering some charm), having recourse to God; — a charm, an amulet, a phylactery; a magic square; a structure of brick or stone work over a grave; a tombstone.
more: n. m. عوذ fleeing for refuge. 1. An amulet; a charm; a magic square ( jantr ). 2. A stone placed over a grave; a tombstone.
(inf. ii. of عوذ) s. m. 1. Having recourse to the deity, asking protection. 2. A charm, an amulet.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَعْوِیذ (ta'wīz), borrowed from Arabic تَعْوِيذ (taʕwīḏ).

ety: S. तात+कः
def: s.m. Paternal uncle ( = tāʼū, q.v.). s.m. Father's elder brother, paternal uncle; — an elder, superior; — an astute fellow, a knave.
more: Mah. n. m. See تاو tā'yasrā , n. m. tāyas , n. f. Father-in-law's elder brother.
wety: Inherited from Middle Hindi تایا (taya /⁠tāyā⁠/) (c. 1435), from Sanskrit *तातिय (*tātiya) / तात्य (tātyá). Cognate with Punjabi تایْا (tāyā) / ਤਾਇਆ (tāiā).

def: s.m. = tawā; and taʼī, qq.v.
more: n. f. 1. A small kauṛī . 2. Pudendum muliebre ( ṭanā ). Kauṛī ajab chhināl hai, ṭaīyāṅ marāonī, Kauṛī ne chhāë dī hai Firangī kī chhāonī . Suthre shāhī. Money's a bawd inconstant, always changing hands, 'Tis money takes the Englishman to foreign lands.

ety: inf. n. v of يقن 'to know for certain'
def: s.m. Knowing for certain, ascertaining; ascertainment; certainty (cf. yaqīn).
more: (inf. v. of يقن) s. m. Ascertaining, ascertainment, certainty.

ety: inf. n. v of يقظ 'to wake, be watchful'
def: s.m. Waking, watchfulness, vigilance; lucubration.
more: (inf. v. of يقظ Heb. ) s. Watchfulness, vigilance, waking.

ety: inf. n. v of ام 'to betake oneself (to)'
def: s.m. lit. 'Betaking oneself to dust, to wipe the face and hands and arms therewith, for prayer'; purifying or rubbing the hands, face, and other parts of the body before prayer, with sand or dust, where water cannot be had.
more: n. m. يم the ocean. Purifying the hands, face, or other parts of the body by rubbing them with sand or dust, where water is not to be had, for the purpose of purificatory ablution.
(inf. v. of يمّ) s. m. Purifying before prayer with sand or dust, when water cannot be had.
wety: From Arabic تَيَمُّم (tayammum).

ety: S. तार्क्ष्य+रः; or तर्तरीकः, rt. तॄ
def: s.m. = H ٿايري टायरी tāyarī, ṭāʼerī, s.f. A horse; a hack.
n. m. ṭāërī , n. f. A hack.

ety: inf. n. of طير 'to fly'
def: s.m. Flying, flight (of birds, &c.).

ety: S. तार्क्ष्य+रः; or तर्तरीकः, rt. तॄ
def: s.m. A horse; a hack.

ety: see next
def: s.f. The wife of a father-in-law's elder brother.

ety: S. तात+श्वशुरकः
def: s.m. Father-in-law's elder brother.
direct plural; oblique/vocative singular
oblique plural of تایا (tāyā)
vocative plural of تایا (tāyā)
airplane; airship; plane (aircraft of any kind)
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian طیاره (tayyāra), from Ottoman Turkish طیاره (tayyâre).

def: direct plural; oblique/vocative singular
oblique plural of طَیَّارہ

ety: rt. of tāḵẖtan; see tāḵẖt
def: adj. Running, hastening, &c. (used in comp.); — s.f. Running, race; — assault, attack, invasion (cf. tāzī)
more: 1. part. act. (from تاختن) in compos. Running, hastening. 2. s. Assault, attack, race, running. تازوتگ tāz o tag, Toil and labour.
subs: s.f. Labour and exertion, toil and trouble (syn. dauṛ-dhūp).

ety: fr. taz; Zend taćañtan, rt. tać = S. तञ्च्
def: adj. (f. -ī), Fresh, new, recent; young, tender; raw, green; fat, plump, in good condition; well-off, prosperous; blooming; pleased, happy
more: adj. 1. Fresh; new; recent; latest. 1. Tāzī khabar . 2. Koī kahe, 'Bābū, idhar ko āo, dekho chīz kyā khāsī, Tājī lo to haigī yāṅ par, aur vāṅ par hai bāsī .' E. Fish-sellers' cry. Some cry, 'this way, Sir, look, what nice ones here are set! If fresh you want they're here, there only stale you'll get.' 2. Green; young; tender. 3. Well-off; prosperous; happy. Tāzā dam. tāzā dam honā , v. n. To be refreshed; to acquire new strength. tāzā karnā , v. a. 1. To renew; renovate; restore; refresh; recreate. 2. To freshen; make fresh; renew. Huqqā tāzā karnā . 3. To revive; cheer. tāzā-vilāyat , n. m. A new-comer; foreigner; green-horn.

postpn. (old H.) = se, q.v. The sixth letter of the Hindūstānī alphabet (the fourth of the Arabic) occurs only in words borrowed from the Arabic. Its sound in Arabic is that of th in the English thin; but in Hindūstānī it has the sound of s. According to the abjad, q.v., it has the numerical value of 500.

r: te, ta, Urdū, Hindūstānī, Nāgarī, Hindī, t, abjad, ta-kār
def: s.m. The letter or sound t
more: is the third letter of the Arabic, and the fourth of the Persian alphabet. It is the 16th consonant in the Hindī alphabet, and the first letter of the तवर्ग or dental class. A termination for a verbal noun, as chalat movement, from chal go; banāvaṭ construction, from banā make. In the representation of Hindī words by the letters of these alphabets, it stands for the Nāgrī त. When used numerically, it denotes 400, according to the abjad, q. v . As an initial, medial and final, it is interchangable with d , as tāgā = dhāgā thread; toṅd = dhoṅd belly; tareṛ = daṛeṛ a fissure; kartā = kardā he does; H. bet = P. bed cane; palīt = P. palīd unclean; H. ant = Eng. end: with s , as te = se from; P. tez = sez sharp; thā = Panj. sā was; shahtūt = sasūt mulbery; H. mutte = musse with me; tetrā = tīsrā third; karat = Bhoj. karas doing; it = is this: with ch , as thopnā = chhopnā apply; tillā = chillā…

represents the Sanskrit or Hindi letter. ट. It does not occur in the Arabic or Persian alphabets; and its sound differs from that of تَ in being formed by pressing hard the tip of the tongue against the palate, instead of the roots of the teeth. It is the eleventh consonant of the Sanskrit and Hindi alphabet, and the first letter of the टवर्ग or cerebral class. It is convertible as an initial and medial with k , as ṭāëṅ ṭāëṅ = kāëṅ kāëṅ cawing; ṭhaḍā = khaḍā standing; anūṭhā = anokhā rare. As an initial with ch , as ṭīs = chīs pain; ṭītā = chīchā vulvæ; ṭoṅṭ = choṅch beak: with ḍ , as Tir. ṭabhkā = ḍabkā fresh water; tābar = ḍābar pond; E. ṭubakh = ḍubak guggle; ṭhīkrā = E. ḍhikṭā potsherd; ṭūṅḍī = E. ḍhoṅḍī navel: with t , q. v.: with d , as ṭhasak = dhasak a cough; with b , as ṭhainyā = bahinyā sister; ṭhanoī = bahnoī brother-in-law: with p , as ṭhaṭerā = phanṭerān the stalk of juār , …

in Arabic called tā, is the third letter of the Arabic and the fourth of the Persian alphabet. In the representation of Hindī words by the letters of these alphabets, it stands for the Nāgarī त or, with ه ( he ) subjoined, for थ . When used numerically, it denotes 400, according to the abjad, or appropriation of the letters of the Arabic alphabet to represent numbers. At the beginning of Arabic words, this letter is much used to form verbal nouns of various forms; as, تعريف from تالم ٫ عرف from تطاول ٫ الم from طول and, prefixed to a noun, it may be the تاٴالقسم denoting an oath; as, تالله By God. At the end of words in that language, moreover, it may be the تاٴتانيث sign of the feminine gender; as, ملکة A queen, from ملک A king: and, this termination may be adopted to restrict the noun to unity; as, تمرة A single date, from تمر: or, it may be used in the formation of infinitives or verb…
subs: vulg. ta-barg, s.m. The dental class of letters in the Nāgarī alphabet.
wety: Learned borrowing from Sanskrit -इत (-ita).

def: adj. See s.v. tej. s.m. Sharpness, pungency; spirit; energy; strength, power; ardour, fire; wrath; splendour, glory, refulgence, awe; — tej-pāt (S. teja+patra), s.m. The leaf of the Laurus cassia, cassia, bay-leaf
more: adj. S. तेजवत् 1. Glorious; splendid. 2. Venerable; majestic. 3. Energetic; strong.
subs: (f. -matī), tej-vān, tej-vant (f. -vatī), adj. & s.m. Sharp, pungent; energetic; strong; glorious, refulgent, splendid, luminous, brilliant, awful, majestic; famous, celebrated; — tej-vatī, s.f. The aromatic plant Pothos officinalis.

def: s.m. Mass, pile, heap, mound, hillock ( = ṭekar); obstacle, bar, hindrance.

n. f. 1. A prop; support. 2. The refrain or chorus of a song. 3. Determination; firm resolution. 4. A promise; vow. 5. E. Bar; hindrance. Ham ko kisī bāt kā ṭek hai? E. 6. Good name (اَبرو 1.). 1. Chalnā bhalā na kos kā, beṭī bhalī na ek, Maṅgnā bhalā na bāp se, jo Pirbhū rākheṅ ṭek . Prov. May I a mile ne'er walk on foot, nor e'er a daughter get, No debt a father owe, God but my honor keep bright-set. 2. Rahiye to ṭek se, nahīṅ jāiye jaṛ peṛ se . Prov. With honor live, or life up give.
more: n. f. 1. E. Top-knot ( choṭī ). 2. A stream of blood from the head. Lahū kī ṭīk chal gaī .

subs: v.n. To be bent (on), be determined or resolved (on).

n. f. 1. An imitative orinarticulate sound; the first screeching notes of a parrot attempting to speak. 1. Jab-kī tote ko maut ne gherā, Kuchh na bolā sivāë ṭeṅ ṭeṅ ṭeṅ . When death hath grasped the parrot's throat ah! then, You only hear thin puling screams of pain. (The proud looks of the oppressor shall be cast down. 2. Zar nest, ishq ṭeṅ ṭeṅ . Prov. Without the coin your suit to back, your love may pule and whine, alack! (Money makes the mare to go.) 2. Mumbling; muttering; murmuring. ṭeṅ ṭeṅ k . v. n. 1. To screech like a parrot. 2. To mumble; murmur; mutter. 3. To babble; prate; talk nonsense ( vāhiyāt baknā ).
pron. A dialectic form of tū, 'thou.'
